title: Qulable Plastic Cups Reusable Unbreakable Tumblers, Set of 4 Travel Mugs, Mouthwash Bathroom Cup Stackable, Plastic Water Cup 280ml for Adults Kids, Dishwasher & Microwave Safe (Multiple Colours)
features: 【Unbreakable & Lightweight】The plastic cups are made of food-grade PP material, these cups are durable and lightweight, perfect for travel or picnics and also stacking to save space.

【Versatile & Convenient】The tumbler cups are microwave and dishwasher safe, and can hold a variety of drinks, including coffee, tea, water, beer, milk, and juice. They're also great for use as a gargle cup or toothbrush beaker.
【Practical Capacity】Each mug can hold up to 10 ounces/280ml of your favorite beverages, making them perfect for a variety of occasions.
【Stylish & Modern】With their beautiful colors and modern design, these bottles are sure to attract attention and complement any table decoration.
【Great Quality】Good quality cups for multiple uses and great value for money. Thousands of customers around the world trust us for their daily needs.
description: Product Description Practical and Beautiful Cup, the Best Choice to Improve the Quality of Life Our cups completely overcome the problem of fragility and can be reused many times. These mouthwash cups are lightweight and durable. They can be used for a variety of purposes, not only as a mouthwash but also as a mug ideal for picnics, families and parties. Safe & Durable Material These cups are made of high quality PP material, drop-proof, durable and odourless. The best choice for kids. Practical Design The bottom is raised and non-slip, so you can use it with confidence, perfect for small children. Variety of Colours The colours are varied, so these mugs can be used in a variety of settings and even as decorative objects Safe toiletries Perfect for picnics Must-have items for party
